inputs.label: Minimum Value
inputs.businessContext: The minimum value of the range to partition into deciles.

inputs.label: Maximum Value
inputs.businessContext: The maximum value of the range to partition into deciles.

inputs.label: Input Value
inputs.businessContext: The value for which to determine the decile.

inputs.label: Number of Deciles
inputs.businessContext: Total number of decile groups (standard is 10).

formulas.decile: Math.max(1, Math.min(totalDeciles, Math.floor(((maxValue - minValue) === 0 ? 0 : (inputValue - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * totalDeciles) + 1))
formulas.lowerBound: minValue + (Math.max(1, Math.min(totalDeciles, Math.floor(((maxValue - minValue) === 0 ? 0 : (inputValue - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * totalDeciles) + 1)) - 1) * ((maxValue - minValue) / totalDeciles)
formulas.upperBound: minValue + Math.max(1, Math.min(totalDeciles, Math.floor(((maxValue - minValue) === 0 ? 0 : (inputValue - minValue) / (maxValue - minValue)) * totalDeciles) + 1)) * ((maxValue - minValue) / totalDeciles)
